hero.heading: Changing lives through community action
hero.subheading: Gloford partners with communities to advance health, education, and resilience.

footer.tagline: A community-based organization dedicated to building resilient communities through integrated programs in education, health, livelihoods, gender equality, and environmental sustainability.

blog.subheading: News, insights, and stories from our programs and the communities we serve.

careers.heading: Careers
careers.subheading: We are always looking for passionate individuals who share our commitment to community development and social impact.
careers.noOpeningsDesc: Check back soon or reach out to us directly.
careers.ctaDesc: We're always looking for talented individuals. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Have a question, want to partner, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.responseTime: We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.
contact.formPlaceholderMessage: Tell us how we can help...
contact.formErrorDefault: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

eventDetail.addToCalendarDesc: Download an .ics file or subscribe to our event feed.

events.heading: Events & Gatherings
events.subheading: Join us online or in person for community events, workshops, and project launches across our regions.
events.empty: Events will appear here once scheduled.
events.ctaDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter to get updates about upcoming events and community activities.

getInvolved.heading: Get Involved
getInvolved.subheading: There are many ways to support our mission. Whether you give your time, talent, or resources, your contribution helps build stronger communities.
getInvolved.cardDonateDesc: Your financial contribution directly supports programs in education, healthcare, and community development. Every gift, big or small, creates lasting impact.
getInvolved.cardVolunteerDesc: Join our volunteer network and contribute your skills, time, and passion. We offer both on-site and remote volunteering opportunities across our programs.
getInvolved.cardCareersDesc: Build a career with purpose. We are always looking for talented individuals who are passionate about social impact and community development.
getInvolved.ctaDesc: No matter how you choose to get involved, your support helps create lasting change in communities that need it most.

leadership.heading: Our Leadership
leadership.subheading: Meet the team guiding our strategy, operations, and accountability. Each leader brings deep local knowledge and a commitment to community-led development.
leadership.empty: Team profiles coming soon. Check back shortly.

newsletterConfirm.subscribedDesc: Thanks for confirming. We'll be in touch with updates and stories soon.
newsletterConfirm.invalidDesc: This confirmation link is no longer valid.

newsletterPreferences.prefCampaignsDesc: Welcome sequences, follow-ups, and milestone emails.

partners.heading: Our Partners
partners.subheading: We believe lasting change comes from collaboration. These organizations stand with us, bringing resources, expertise, and shared vision to communities across Uganda.
partners.becomePartnerDesc: Interested in partnering with us? Fill out the form below and our team will be in touch.
partners.formAboutOrgPlaceholder: Brief description of your organization and its mission...
partners.formMessagePlaceholder: How would you like to collaborate with us?
partners.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in partnering with us. Our team will review your application and respond shortly.

programs.heading: Our Programs
programs.subheading: We design and implement community-driven programs that create lasting change in education, healthcare, and sustainable development.
programs.empty: Programs will appear here once published.
programs.ctaDesc: Your generosity helps us expand our reach and deepen our impact across communities.

volunteer.heading: Volunteer With Us
volunteer.subheading: Your time and skills can transform lives. Join our volunteer network and contribute to meaningful community development across Uganda.
volunteer.noOpportunitiesDesc: We don't have any open volunteer positions right now, but check back soon. New opportunities are added regularly.
volunteer.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of volunteers who are already creating positive change. Your time and talent matter.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.subheading: A community-driven foundation dedicated to empowering underserved communities through sustainable development, education, and healthcare.
whoWeAre.storyHeading: From a Vision to a Movement
whoWeAre.storyP1: Founded with a simple yet powerful belief — that every community deserves the opportunity to thrive — we began our journey in the heart of East Africa. What started as a small group of passionate individuals has grown into a movement touching thousands of lives.
whoWeAre.storyP2: Over the years, we have partnered with local communities, governments, and international organizations to deliver programs that create lasting change. From building schools to training healthcare workers, every initiative is rooted in the belief that sustainable development begins with empowered people.
whoWeAre.storyP3: Today, we continue to expand our reach, driven by the same passion that inspired our founding — and the communities we serve remain at the heart of everything we do.
whoWeAre.missionText: To empower marginalized communities through education, healthcare, and sustainable development programs that foster self-reliance, dignity, and long-term prosperity for all.
whoWeAre.visionText: A world where every community has equitable access to education, healthcare, and economic opportunity — where no one is left behind and every person can reach their full potential.
whoWeAre.valueCompassionDesc: We lead with empathy and genuine care for the communities we serve.
whoWeAre.valueIntegrityDesc: Transparency and accountability in every action, every decision.
whoWeAre.valueCommunityDesc: We believe in the power of collective action and local ownership.
whoWeAre.valueInnovationDesc: Creative, sustainable solutions tailored to each community's needs.
whoWeAre.ctaDesc: Join us in our mission to create lasting change. Every contribution matters.
